Looking at the logic in `event_gate`:

The condition on line 62 checks `if len(recent) > limit`, but it should check `if len(recent) >= limit`. 

When `len(recent) == limit`, the gate should be closed (no more events allowed), but the current code returns `True, 0` (allowed with zero remaining) instead of `False, 0`. The event should not be allowed when the count already equals the limit.
